Uses of Class
com.irurueta.geometry.Rotation3D

  • Packages that use Rotation3D 
    Package Description
    com.irurueta.geometry
    This package contains classes to work with basic geometric entities such as 2D or 3D points, lines, planes, 2D or 3D triangles or polygons, circles, spheres, rotations, transformations etc.

    • Uses of Rotation3D in com.irurueta.geometry

      Subclasses of Rotation3D in com.irurueta.geometry 
      Modifier and Type Class Description
      class  AxisRotation3D
      This class defines the amount of rotation for 3D points or planes.
      class  MatrixRotation3D
      This class defines the amount of rotation for 3D points or planes.
      class  Quaternion
      Contains a representation of a 3D rotation in a more precise and compact way than in matrix notation.
      Fields in com.irurueta.geometry declared as Rotation3D 
      Modifier and Type Field Description
      private Rotation3D PinholeCamera.mCameraRotation
      3D rotation of the camera after decomposition.
      private Rotation3D Ellipsoid.mRotation
      Rotation.
      private Rotation3D EuclideanTransformation3D.rotation
      3D rotation to be performed on geometric objects.
      Methods in com.irurueta.geometry that return Rotation3D 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      Rotation3D AxisRotation3D.combineAndReturnNew​(Rotation3D rotation)
      Combines provided rotation with this rotation and returns the result as a new MatrixRotation3D instance.
      Rotation3D MatrixRotation3D.combineAndReturnNew​(Rotation3D rotation)
      Combines provided rotation with this rotation and returns the result as a new MatrixRotation3D instance.
      Rotation3D Quaternion.combineAndReturnNew​(Rotation3D rotation)
      Combines provided rotation with this quaternion and returns the result as a new quaternion instance.
      abstract Rotation3D Rotation3D.combineAndReturnNew​(Rotation3D rotation)
      Combines provided rotation with this rotation and returns the result as a new Rotation3D instance.

      Factory method.

      Factory method.

      Factory method.
      static Rotation3D Rotation3D.create​(Rotation3DType type)
      Factory method.
      Rotation3D PinholeCamera.getCameraRotation()
      Returns camera rotation if camera has already been decomposed and rotation is available.
      Rotation3D AffineTransformation3D.getRotation()
      Returns 3D rotation assigned to this transformation.
      Rotation3D Ellipsoid.getRotation()
      Gets rotation.
      Rotation3D EuclideanTransformation3D.getRotation()
      Returns 3D rotation assigned to this transformation.
      Rotation3D ProjectiveTransformation3D.getRotation()
      Returns the 3D rotation component associated to this transformation.
      Rotation3D Quaternion.inverseRotationAndReturnNew()
      Returns a 3D rotation which is inverse to this instance.
      abstract Rotation3D Rotation3D.inverseRotationAndReturnNew()
      Returns a 3D rotation which is inverse to this instance.
      Methods in com.irurueta.geometry with parameters of type Rotation3D 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      void AffineTransformation3D.addRotation​(Rotation3D rotation)
      Adds provided rotation to current rotation assigned to this transformation.
      void EuclideanTransformation3D.addRotation​(Rotation3D rotation)
      Adds provided rotation to current rotation assigned to this transformation.
      void ProjectiveTransformation3D.addRotation​(Rotation3D rotation)
      Adds provided rotation to current rotation assigned to this transformation.
      void AxisRotation3D.combine​(Rotation3D rotation)
      Combines provided rotation into this rotation resulting in the multiplication of the internal matrices of both rotations.
      void MatrixRotation3D.combine​(Rotation3D rotation)
      Combines provided rotation into this rotation resulting in the multiplication of the internal matrices of both rotations.
      void Quaternion.combine​(Rotation3D rotation)
      Combines provided rotation into this quaternion, resulting in the multiplication of both quaternion representations.
      abstract void Rotation3D.combine​(Rotation3D rotation)
      Combines provided rotation into this rotation resulting in the multiplication of the internal matrices of both rotations.

      Combines provided rotation with this rotation and returns the result as a new MatrixRotation3D instance.

      Combines provided rotation with this rotation and returns the result as a new MatrixRotation3D instance.

      Combines provided rotation with this quaternion and returns the result as a new quaternion instance.

      Combines provided rotation with this rotation and returns the result as a new Rotation3D instance.
